task: Validate checkout button visibility changes in the UI flow

ground_truth.acquisition: Compared current runtime behavior against screenshot baseline
ground_truth.metrics_and_thresholds: checkout hidden before terms acceptance and visible after acceptance
ground_truth.h1: Checkout button visibility now follows the terms acceptance state
ground_truth.h0: UI still behaves the same as before or only logs changed
ground_truth.decision_rule: Accept when button is hidden before acceptance and visible after acceptance

commands.purpose: Run browser harness for checkout visibility flow
commands.observed_signal: Browser preflight and harness completed without runtime errors

artifacts.proves: Corroborating UI state log was captured

criteria_results.criterion: Checkout button is hidden before terms acceptance
Checkout button appears after terms acceptance

cleanup.resources_started: Playwright Chromium process tree and temporary local UI server

command_ownership.human_required_reason: Final click-path confirmation still requires a human review

preconditions: Open the staging checkout page with demo cart state.
steps: Confirm the checkout button is hidden before accepting terms.
Accept terms and confirm the checkout button becomes visible.
pass_signals: Checkout button hidden before terms are accepted
Checkout button visible after terms are accepted
fail_signals: Checkout button never appears after accepting terms
human_verification.return_condition: Send a screenshot pair if both checks pass, or stop immediately on mismatch.
operator_notes: Use the seeded demo cart so the page loads deterministically.
